title: Railway Decoration Blocks
description: A mod adding various decorative blocks, like signs, for building train stations.
body:
This mod is dedicated to adding various decorative blocks, such as signs, for building railway stations.

## Features
The mod features signage blocks such as platform indicator numbers, zones (A-D), exits, staircases, ticket booths, entrances to metros, etc., as well as a "railway crafting item" used for crafting these blocks in Survival mode.

In the future, more types of blocks will be added as well, such as platform edge stripes and decorations for the interior of station buildings (such as ticket machines), as well as different styles of signage.

## Preview
![An underpass with directional signs pointing to the exit, ticket booth, metro Line A, as well as signs next to the staircase indicating the platform numbers.](https://samuele963.github.io/railwaydecorationsmod/screenshots/screenshot4.png)

## Current items
- Railway crafting item - used for crafting the rest of the items in the mod (to avoid potential conflicts)
- Empty railway signs (blue and white)
- Platform numbers 1-12
- Zone A-D signs (blue and white)
- Exit signs (blue and white)
- Large "exit" and "tickets" sign
- Zone A-D indicator signs (either 1 or 2 blocks wide)
- Tickets and Exit indicator signs
- Ticket booth sign
- Staircase signs (ascending and descending)
- Bar and Restaurant signs
- No entry sign
- Metro station signs (metro entrance sign and lines A and B signs)
